message:
The other day, I took my pup, Max, on our usual walk. As we strolled through the park, I noticed a little commotion. A couple of kids were playing frisbee nearby, and one of them accidentally threw it right into a muddy puddle. It splashed everywhere! Max, being the playful dog he is, decided that meant it was time for a good roll in the mud. 

While I was trying to catch him, I remembered that I had packed a small towel and some wipes in my bag just in case of 'dog emergencies.' And boy, was that a small win! I managed to clean him up enough before we got home, avoiding a full-blown muddy disaster in the house. 

It’s funny how a little preparedness goes a long way, even when it comes to muddy dog antics. Have you ever had a small win that made your day easier?
